Class ClanService

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.clans.service.ClanService
All Implemented Interfaces:
ClanAPI
public class ClanService extends Object implements ClanAPI
Business logic implementation of ClanAPI.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

    Method
    Description

    addMember(UUID clanId, UUID playerUuid, ClanInviteService inviteService)
    Adds a player to a clan with the configured default permissions.

    Creates a new clan with the given player as the leader.

    Returns all clans, each fully assembled with members and permissions.

    Returns a clan by its unique identifier.

    getClanByName(String name)
    Returns a clan by its display name (case-insensitive).
    CompletableFuture<Optional<Clan>>

    Returns the clan the given player currently belongs to.

    Returns the player's clan from the in-memory cache without hitting the database.

    Revokes a permission from a clan member.

    Loads and caches the clan snapshot for a player, if they are in one.

    Updates the default member permissions applied to new members.

  • Constructor Details

    • ClanService

      public ClanService(IClanRepository clanRepository, TerritoryService territoryService, ClanCache clanCache, org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, List<ClanPermission> defaultMemberPermissions)
      Parameters:
      clanRepository - persistence layer for clans and members
      territoryService - territory logic, used during disbandment
      clanCache - in-memory membership cache
      plugin - the owning plugin, used for scheduler hops
      defaultMemberPermissions - permissions granted to a new member on join

  • Method Details

    • setDefaultMemberPermissions

      public void setDefaultMemberPermissions(List<ClanPermission> permissions)
      Updates the default member permissions applied to new members. Called after a config reload.
      Parameters:
      permissions - the new default permission list

    • getClanByPlayer

      public CompletableFuture<Optional<Clan>> getClanByPlayer(UUID playerUuid)
      Description copied from interface: ClanAPI
      Returns the clan the given player currently belongs to.
      Specified by:
      getClanByPlayer in interface ClanAPI
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - the player's UUID
      Returns:
      a future of the player's clan, or empty if they are not in one

    • getClanByPlayerCached

      public Optional<Clan> getClanByPlayerCached(UUID playerUuid)
      Description copied from interface: ClanAPI
      Returns the player's clan from the in-memory cache without hitting the database. Returns empty if the player is not cached (not yet loaded or not in a clan). Suitable for per-tick or per-render paths where blocking is not acceptable.
      Specified by:
      getClanByPlayerCached in interface ClanAPI
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - the player's UUID
      Returns:
      the cached clan snapshot, or empty

    • getClanById

      public CompletableFuture<Optional<Clan>> getClanById(UUID clanId)
      Description copied from interface: ClanAPI
      Returns a clan by its unique identifier.
      Specified by:
      getClanById in interface ClanAPI
      Parameters:
      clanId - the clan's UUID
      Returns:
      a future of the clan, or empty if no clan with that ID exists

    • getClanByName

      public CompletableFuture<Optional<Clan>> getClanByName(String name)
      Description copied from interface: ClanAPI
      Returns a clan by its display name (case-insensitive).
      Specified by:
      getClanByName in interface ClanAPI
      Parameters:
      name - the clan's display name
      Returns:
      a future of the clan, or empty if no clan with that name exists

    • getAllClans

      public CompletableFuture<List<Clan>> getAllClans()
      Returns all clans, each fully assembled with members and permissions.
      Returns:
      a future of all clans

    • createClan

      public CompletableFuture<Void> createClan(UUID leaderUuid, String name)
      Creates a new clan with the given player as the leader.
      Parameters:
      leaderUuid - the UUID of the founding player
      name - the clan display name (max 32 chars, alphanumeric/hyphens)
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the clan is created
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the name is already taken or fails validation

    • disbandClan

      public CompletableFuture<Void> disbandClan(UUID clanId)
      Disbands a clan. Removes all territory claims, clears the cache for all members, and fires ClanDisbandEvent.
      Parameters:
      clanId - the clan to disband
      Returns:
      a future that completes when disbandment is fully applied

    • addMember

      public CompletableFuture<Void> addMember(UUID clanId, UUID playerUuid, ClanInviteService inviteService)
      Adds a player to a clan with the configured default permissions. Clears all their pending invites after a successful join.
      Parameters:
      clanId - the clan to join
      playerUuid - the player joining
      inviteService - the invite service, used to clear pending invites
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the member is added

    • removeMember

      public CompletableFuture<Void> removeMember(UUID clanId, UUID playerUuid, ClanMemberLeaveEvent.Cause cause)
      Removes a member from their clan (kick or voluntary leave). Their permission rows are removed automatically by the database cascade.
      Parameters:
      clanId - the clan the player is leaving
      playerUuid - the player to remove
      cause - whether the player left voluntarily or was kicked
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the member is removed

    • transferLeadership

      public CompletableFuture<Void> transferLeadership(UUID clanId, UUID newLeaderUuid)
      Transfers leadership from the current leader to another member. Fires a single ClanLeadershipTransferEvent carrying both leaders.
      Parameters:
      clanId - the clan in which leadership is being transferred
      newLeaderUuid - the member who will become the new leader
      Returns:
      a future that completes when both rows are updated

    • grantPermission

      public CompletableFuture<Void> grantPermission(UUID requesterId, UUID targetId, ClanPermission permission)
      Grants a permission to a clan member.

      If permission is a GRANT_* entry, the requester must be the LEADER. Otherwise the requester must hold permission.asGrant().

      Parameters:
      requesterId - the player attempting the grant
      targetId - the player receiving the permission
      permission - the permission to grant
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the permission is persisted
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the requester lacks authority

    • revokePermission

      public CompletableFuture<Void> revokePermission(UUID requesterId, UUID targetId, ClanPermission permission)
      Revokes a permission from a clan member. Uses the same authority rules as grantPermission(UUID, UUID, ClanPermission).
      Parameters:
      requesterId - the player attempting the revocation
      targetId - the player losing the permission
      permission - the permission to revoke
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the permission row is deleted
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the requester lacks authority

    • seedCacheForPlayer

      public CompletableFuture<Void> seedCacheForPlayer(UUID playerUuid)
      Loads and caches the clan snapshot for a player, if they are in one. No-op if the player is not a clan member or is already cached.
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - the joining player's UUID
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the cache is populated

    • releaseCacheForPlayer

      public void releaseCacheForPlayer(UUID playerUuid)
      Evicts a player's cached clan snapshot. Called when the player disconnects so the cache stays bounded by online players. No-op if the player is not cached.
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - the disconnecting player's UUID

    • setMotd

      public CompletableFuture<Void> setMotd(UUID clanId, String rawMotd)
      Sets or clears a clan's message of the day and refreshes the cache. Interactive MiniMessage (click, hover, insertion) is stripped before storage; null clears it.
      Parameters:
      clanId - the clan to update
      rawMotd - the raw MiniMessage input, or null to clear
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the change is persisted and cached
